ksa_text: Ability to evaluate network infrastructure, system architectures, and platform capabilities, analyzing vulnerabilities and performance characteristics across interconnected systems.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: ability from Technology Fundamentals (domain affinity 0.82); no DE-specific signals and low domain affinity. STRM composite score is strong (0.4346, top tier for this dataset). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
